productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Solid Navy Blue Track Pants
description: Composition Navy Official Merchandise manchester united trackpants made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, has an elasticated waistband with a drawcord, slant hip pockets and one patch pocket at the back, mock fly top-stitching, branding embroidered on the left thigh and team branding printed on the right thigh Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron, do not iron on print Dress for greatness with these Official Merchandise Manchester United football Club trackpants. These soft and comfortable tracksuit pants pay homage to the incredibly successful team with branding on the front. Team this with a tee and Man U sweatshirt for a trip to a football match or for casual outings when only the genuine Man Utd article will do. Model statistics The product is a size M, length 41.5”, on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
